_comment: A kind:31237 release event carrying ONLY the `d` tag — no title, no artist, no optional tags. release.v1 guarantees only `d`; ndisc's push_tag omits any empty-valued tag, title/artist included. parseRelease must accept this event (gate on `d` alone) and fall back title/artist to 'Untitled'/'Unknown Artist' for display. id/pubkey/created_at/sig are illustrative.
